title: Project Miner Local PM Intake Output Selector
objective: Reduce day-to-day PM output-selection burden by adding a browser-local output selector to the Project Miner intake workbench, while preserving that it is derived synthesis only and not a new export contract, approval, persistence, import, issue, task, work authorization, assignment, schedule, status, durable field record, production tracking write, hosted parity proof, or production mutation.
active_role: Technical Repo Authority / PM Product Coordinator / AI Orchestration Output-Selector Implementer
implemented_scope: Add a Local PM Intake Output Selector panel near the top of /pm-review/import-intake.
Derive the selector from the existing local decision draft, review checklist, field prep queue, executor closeout checklist, field questions draft, and field observation scratchpad.
Show guidance for choosing among existing outputs: PM Brief, Approval Preview JSON, Executor Handoff, Field Kickoff Brief, and Field Prep Packet.
Add Output Selector to the existing PM Intake Quick Jump Rail.

Add focused smoke coverage for selector rendering, link targets, initial and updated derived text, no new localStorage key, exact four read seams, zero mutation calls, and no approve/persist/submit/import controls.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
allowed_actions: Modify the local operations-web import-intake page.
Update PM lane operating docs, project status, packet, and handoff.
Use one read-only sidecar scout for output-selector scope review.
Run focused local validation, commit, push, and restore host parity.
not_allowed: No DNS, auth, ingress, or secret change.
validation_steps: rg -n "ready for field|ready for execution|field ready|field log of record|daily review record|script completed|review approved|selected output|routing choice|daily report|tracking system|percent complete|released|cleared|approved|accepted|authorized|go/no-go passed|dispatch|dispatched|assigned|scheduled|customer confirmed|JHA complete|LOTO approved|material released|issue created|task created|work order|production-ready" apps/operations-web/app/pm-review/import-intake/page.tsx apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts

corepack pnpm --dir apps/operations-web exec playwright test tests/browser-shell.pm-import-candidate.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-admission-plan.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-approval-readiness.smoke.spec.ts tests/browser-shell.pm-import-intake.smoke.spec.ts
validation_results: operations-web production build passed with /pm-review/import-intake in the route output.
PM output-selector wording scan passed with no matches.
Focused import-intake Playwright smoke passed with 1 passed.
Focused PM intake Playwright smoke suite passed with 4 passed.
Packet JSON parse passed with packet-json-ok.
git diff --check passed with line-ending normalization warnings only.
